nodes.label: Husky brand mark image (frontal husky head illustration)
nodes.description: A stylized line-art illustration of a husky dog's head viewed frontally, drawn with white/light line strokes on a transparent or light background, featuring distinctive blue eyes as the main color accent. Used as a brand mark/logo.

nodes.label: Husky Logo Mark
nodes.description: The husky head illustration functions as a brand logo mark, likely used in sidebar/branding contexts based on repository context.

nodes.label: Piercing blue husky eyes (accent color element)
nodes.description: Two bright blue eyes are the only colored elements in the otherwise monochrome line-art illustration, drawing visual focus and serving as the primary brand color accent.

nodes.label: Husky head line-art illustration
nodes.description: Frontal view of a husky's head rendered as minimalist line art with visible ears, snout, nose, and facial fur markings.

nodes.label: Dash brand identity (visual system)
nodes.description: Inferred brand identity system that uses the husky mark; project directory is named 'Dash' and recent commits reference sidebar husky mark and wordmark sizing.

nodes.label: Sidebar husky mark (UI placement)
nodes.description: Husky mark used in the application sidebar at 56px size per recent commit 'Bump sidebar husky mark from 48 to 56px'.
